name: Top-Down RPG Starter
description: A top-down RPG framework with 8-directional player movement, tile-based world map, NPC dialogue system, inventory management, and basic combat. Includes a CharacterBody2D player with directional sprites, TileMap world with collision layers, interactive NPCs, and a dialogue UI.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project configuration — display: 1280x720, pixel art rendering (nearest filter, integer scaling), input map with move_up/down/left/right/interact/attack actions

scenes/.main.tscn: Root scene — manages world loading and transitions
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D (directional spritesheet), CollisionShape2D (circle), Area2D interaction zone, AnimationPlayer (walk_up/down/left/right, idle variants)
scenes/.world/overworld.tscn: Node2D — TileMap with ground layer, obstacle layer, decoration layer. Marker2D nodes for NPC spawn points and doorways
scenes/.world/interior_house.tscn: Node2D — interior TileMap, transition zones back to overworld
scenes/.npcs/npc_base.tscn: CharacterBody2D — Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, Area2D for interaction range, dialogue trigger
scenes/.ui/dialogue_box.tscn: CanvasLayer — NinePatchRect background, RichTextLabel for text with typewriter effect, name Label, portrait TextureRect, choice buttons VBoxContainer
scenes/.ui/inventory.tscn: CanvasLayer — GridContainer of inventory slots, item description panel, equip/use buttons
scenes/.ui/hud.tscn: CanvasLayer — health hearts, mana bar, minimap TextureRect, current quest label

scripts/.player.gd: extends CharacterBody2D — SPEED=150, 8-directional movement with animation direction tracking, interaction raycast, _input handles interact key to trigger nearby NPC dialogue
scripts/.npc_base.gd: extends CharacterBody2D — dialogue_lines array, current_line index, can_interact flag, face_player() rotates sprite toward player, start_dialogue() emits signal to dialogue manager
scripts/.dialogue_manager.gd: extends Node (autoload) — manages dialogue flow, typewriter text effect, choice branching, tracks conversation state per NPC
scripts/.inventory_manager.gd: extends Node (autoload) — items dictionary, add_item/remove_item/has_item functions, signals for UI updates, save/load support
scripts/.game_state.gd: extends Node (autoload) — quest flags, NPC states, world state persistence, save/load to JSON

assets/.placeholder_tiles.png: 16x16 RPG tileset (grass, dirt, water, walls, doors, decorations)

preBuiltMechanics: NPC interaction system with proximity detection
Typewriter dialogue box with character portraits
Basic inventory system with grid UI
Game state persistence (quest flags, NPC states)
Tile-based world with multiple collision layers
customizationPoints: NPC placement, dialogue content, and portraits
Add quests by extending game_state quest flags
Combat system (extend player.gd with attack states)
Add new areas by creating world scenes with transition zones
Shop system by combining NPC dialogue with inventory
Sprite assets (swap placeholders for pixel art)
examplePrompts: Create an RPG where I explore a village and talk to people
Build a top-down game with quests and inventory
Design a pixel art RPG with NPCs and a shop
